misc: Loves basketball even more than Marcus, making some fans wonder if he's a real golfer
biography: Pasi, representing Vuosaari Golf Helsinki, has carved out a notable presence in the esteemed Hector Trophée, having participated in four prior editions of this distinguished pair competition. Affectionately known as "Susi-Pasi," a moniker suggesting a tenacious and formidable competitor, he has certainly left his mark on the greens.

Across his four appearances, Pasi has demonstrated his capacity for excellence in the team format, steering his pairing to claim the coveted Hector Trophée on one memorable occasion. This triumph underscores his strategic prowess and ability to perform effectively alongside a partner. While the individual Victor Trophy has thus far eluded him, his contribution to a team victory remains a significant achievement in his tournament history.

Beyond the fairways, Pasi possesses a profound passion for basketball, a dedication so intense it has playfully led some observers to question if his heart truly belongs to golf—even surpassing the enthusiasm of fellow competitor Marcus. Yet, this multifaceted interest in no way diminishes his competitive drive when he steps onto the golf course, where he applies himself with focused determination.

As the Hector Trophée 2026 approaches, Pasi will regrettably not be among the active participants. However, his continued engagement in other Hector events signals that his journey within this community of golfers is far from over, leaving the door open for future competitive returns to the tournament he has graced with his distinctive presence.
